author: doll-agent
content: ferray.autodiff delivered. src/autodiff.rs binds DualNumber<f64> as a #[pyclass] with constants/variable static constructors, real/dual getters, full arithmetic dunder set (__add__/__radd__/__sub__/__rsub__/__mul__/__rmul__/__truediv__/__rtruediv__/__neg__/__pow__) supporting mixed DualNumber+int/float operands, plus 16 elementary functions (sin/cos/tan/asin/acos/atan/atan2/sinh/cosh/tanh/exp/ln/log2/log10/sqrt/abs). High-level helpers (derivative, gradient, jacobian) implemented in pure Python (python/ferray/autodiff/__init__.py) on top of the bound DualNumber class. 31 new pytest passing (525/525 total). Strategy: f64-only since pyclass can't be generic; DualNumber<f32>/<Complex> deferred. ferray.autodiff is ferray-specific (NumPy doesn't have first-class autodiff) but useful for optimisation/sensitivity pipelines.
